properties.name: New Brighton (Perch Rock) Lighthouse
properties.description: 1827 Built Conical Lighthouse, Utilising An Interlocking Dove-Tail Masonry Design, Coated With Volcanic Resin ("Puzzellani"). The Lighthouse Is Currently Lit By An LED Light Source And Four LED Down Lights, Powered Via A Solar Array.

properties.name: South Foreland Lower Lighthouse
properties.description: built 1843, decommissioned in 1904, it is now in private ownership
